debug_info.goal:
V : Type u
inst : DecidableEq V
G : SimpleGraph V
u v_1 ih w w_1 : V
p_1 : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk V G w ih
h_ind :
  Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G w ih inst p_1) ≤
    Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G w ih inst p_1) + 1
h : G.Adj w_1 w
h_support :
  @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G w_1 ih inst (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.cons V G w_1 w ih h p_1) =
    insert w_1 (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G w ih inst p_1)
h_edge :
  @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G w_1 ih inst (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.cons V G w_1 w ih h p_1) =
    @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G w ih inst p_1
hv : w_1 ∉ @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G w ih inst p_1
H : s(w_1, w) ∈ @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G w ih inst p_1
left : (w, w_1) ∈ @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts V G w ih p_1
right : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.dartEdge V (w, w_1) = s(w_1, w)
⊢ w_1 ∈ @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.support V G w ih p_1
